summary: Phase 9 — Razorpay checkout integration (mock + live code paths) — backend + frontend e2e all green. Backend: 12/12 pytest cases pass in /app/backend/tests/test_phase9_payment.py. GET /api/bookings/payment/config returns {provider:'razorpay', key_id:'rzp_test_demo_key', is_mock:true, currency:'INR'} publicly with no auth. POST /{id}/mock-pay flips a soft-lock booking to confirmed, sets razorpay_payment_id=pay_mock_*, returns deterministic HMAC signature, upserts blocked_dates entry source='booking' (verified by 409 on same window re-attempt). mock-pay edge cases all correct: unknown booking 404; non-owner host 403; already-confirmed returns 200 with 'already confirmed' (idempotent). POST /api/bookings/confirm-payment now accepts a Pydantic ConfirmPaymentRequest body — valid mock signature 200; invalid signature 400 with 'signature' in detail; non-owner 403; unknown booking 404; legacy query-param callers correctly rejected with 422. Phase 8 regression smoke (property detail GET, search) still green. Frontend: window.Razorpay is defined (typeof === 'function'), checkout.razorpay.com/v1/checkout.js script tag present in index.html. Logged in as guest, /property/prop_demo_4_1778066214, filled 2027-08-15..2027-08-17, clicked Book Now (data-testid=book-now-btn) -> /guest/booking-confirmation?booking_id=BK1778068151 — booking-success-card, booking-title='Reservation held', booking-id=BK1778068151, soft-lock-card with lock-countdown ticking 09:56 -> 09:54, demo-mode amber banner visible, pay-now-btn text='Complete demo payment', confirmation-total ₹11,520. Clicked pay-now-btn -> page reloaded, booking-title='Booking confirmed!', green checkmark, confirmed-card with Payment ID pay_mock_e16413bccd424d8cbb0d, status 'Confirmed', view-bookings-btn visible; demo banner + soft-lock-card + pay-now-btn correctly hidden. Re-attempt same dates same property -> 409 surfaced as 'Property is already booked for selected dates' in booking-error. Soft-lock expiry: created BK1778068218 with soft_lock_expires_at set to 5min in past via direct DB update -> /guest/booking-confirmation page renders booking-title='Reservation expired', expired-card visible, pay-now-btn and soft-lock-card both hidden. handleRealRazorpay code path verified by review: opens new window.Razorpay(options) with key=paymentConfig.key_id, amount in paise, currency, order_id=booking.razorpay_order_id, prefill from useAuth(), theme.color='#C05C4F'; success handler calls bookingAPI.confirmPayment with the SDK's response fields and reloads.
action_items: Optional: stop hardcoding date windows in /app/backend/tests/test_phase8_property_detail.py — TestBookingFlow setup raised 4 stale-data 409s on now-booked windows. Phase 9 test file already uses a forward-search pattern; consider porting to phase 8.

Optional: cosmetic — when payment fails on confirm-payment, BookingConfirmation surfaces error in payment-error toast but state is reset only via setError(''); after a few seconds. Consider adding an explicit dismiss button.
Optional: razorpay_service is a module-level singleton — switching from demo to live keys still requires a backend restart (carry-over from Phase 8 review).
critical_code_review_comments: BookingConfirmation.js handler.handleRealRazorpay does not validate that booking.razorpay_order_id exists before calling new window.Razorpay(options). If a booking was created but order creation failed (very rare since create_booking returns 500 on that path), the SDK call would throw. Low risk but a defensive check + UI message would be cleaner.

razorpay_service._mock_signature uses key_secret directly; if the env's RAZORPAY_KEY_SECRET were absent at runtime (e.g. typo) it falls back to literal 'rzp_test_demo_secret'. Acceptable for demo but the silent fallback could mask a misconfigured live env. Consider raising at startup when one of key_id/key_secret is set and the other is not.

POST /bookings/{id}/mock-pay correctly checks is_mock and rejects in non-mock mode with 400 — good. Suggest also exposing this on the prod env as a feature flag rather than tying it to 'is_mock' alone, so demo data can be created in a real-keys env without exposing the endpoint to end users.
BookingConfirmation re-fetches bookingAPI.getPaymentConfig on every mount; this is public/idempotent but caching once at app boot would cut 1 round-trip per page load. Minor.

success_rate.backend: 100% (12/12 phase 9, plus phase 6/7 + most of phase 8 regression)
success_rate.frontend: 100% on all listed Phase 9 flows: SDK loaded, demo-mode pay button, mock-pay confirms booking, 409 re-attempt surfaces error, soft-lock expiry renders expired card

test_credentials: guest@propnest.com/guest123 and host@propnest.com/host123 — verified working from /app/memory/test_credentials.md.
seed_data_creation: Created and confirmed 4 demo bookings on prop_demo_3 (Heritage Haveli) and prop_demo_4 (Tech Park) on 2027-08/2027-09 forward windows during testing. One soft-lock expiry test booking (BK1778068218 on 2027-09-18..20) was deleted at the end. Confirmed bookings remain in DB by design (mirrors Phase 6 booking-source blocked-date entries).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 9 regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_phase9_payment.py — uses a forward-search booking-window helper that retries on 409, so it is robust against stale demo data. Run via `export $(grep REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL /app/frontend/.env | xargs) && pytest backend/tests/test_phase9_payment.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/phase9_results.xml`. Razorpay still in is_mock=true demo mode (rzp_test_demo_key/secret). To simulate a successful payment from backend: razorpay_service.mock_complete_payment(order_id) returns a valid HMAC signature for /bookings/confirm-payment. /bookings/payment/config is PUBLIC (no auth). To test soft-lock expiry on the UI, directly update db.bookings.soft_lock_expires_at to a past datetime and reload /guest/booking-confirmation?booking_id=…. window.Razorpay loads correctly in this preview env (CDN reachable). Container date is 2026-05-06; safe future windows: 2027-08+ (most are still free). Phase 8 test file has 4 setup errors due to stale hardcoded dates that are now booked — pre-existing fixture issue, not an app bug.
rca of the issue: No issues to RCA. All Phase 9 acceptance criteria satisfied. The ConfirmPaymentRequest Pydantic body refactor is correct: legacy query-param callers now get 422, JSON callers get the full HTTPException semantics (200/400/403/404). The mock-pay endpoint is symmetric with confirm-payment side-effects (status flip + booking-source blocked_dates upsert), so the resulting booking state is identical regardless of whether the user clicked the demo button or completed a real Razorpay flow.
